jobDescription: Iterable is the growth marketing platform that enables brands to create, execute and optimize campaigns to power world-class customer engagement across email, push, SMS, in-app and more with unparalleled data flexibility. We are an integrated, cross-channel solution— Iterable is built for marketers, trusted by engineers, and designed with intelligence. We know this space well: our product team built the growth systems that powered Twitter’s early success. We've recently raised a $50 M Series C from top-tier investors like Index Ventures and CRV, and hundreds of companies like Zillow, Seat Geek, and Box rely on us to captivate their many millions of users. Iterable's momentum grows daily and there has never been a more exciting time to join the team! We've been recognized as one of the Best Places to Work for two years running, earned ourselves a top 20 spot among the Saa S 1000, and we host an annual growth marketing conference where innovative marketers around the world come to share ideas. We have a nation-wide presence with offices in San Francisco, New York, and Denver, plus we’re expanding internationally as we open an office in London. The Role: As part of our Product Team, you will work closely with company leaders across the company. You will also work with some of the biggest and well known brands out there to deliver the growth marketing solutions they need. You will have ownership over broad product areas with a wide scope of responsibilities as our product continues to grow. You are passionate about helping companies, both Iterable and our customers, grow. The Team Iterable is the growth marketing platform that enables brands to create, execute and optimize campaigns to power world-class customer engagement across email, push, SMS, in-app and more with unparalleled data flexibility. We are an integrated, cross-channel solution— Iterable is built for marketers, trusted by engineers, and designed with intelligence. We know this space well: our product team built the growth systems that powered Twitter’s early success. We've recently raised a $50 M Series C from top-tier investors like Index Ventures and CRV, and hundreds of companies like Zillow, Seat Geek, and Box rely on us to captivate their many millions of users. Position Details: Contribute to the vision and design of a next generation marketing automation platform Serve as the internal “voice of the customer” Work cross-functionally with the customer success, engineering, marketing and sales teams to develop product roadmap and feature prioritization Build use cases and define product requirements to roll out new features and enhancements Provide ongoing documentation of customer demands and product functionality Work with other platform and product owners to drive company-wide initiatives Research industry trends to identify new product features and opportunities The Ideal Candidate Will Be/ Have:5+ years of experience working on a Saa S product Have experience working with agile engineering teams with tools like Jira to manage product milestones and communicate priorities Deep understanding of technical and data intensive products & APIs Significant experience with user testing and data analysis Highly analytical, hypothesis-driven, data-supported approach to problem solving Strategic thinker that combines business acumen and technical know-how to drive decisions Not afraid to to take initiative but also highly collaborative, self-driven and able to work independently, and and enthusiastic team player who thrives in a startup environment Bonus Points: Familiarity with user growth and engagement strategies Hands-on experience using data analysis tools (e.g. SQL, Excel, Looker) to deliver insights Prior work experience in B2 B markets
